# PGD 1.05 Nominal Velocity Profiles

- Scope: nominal velocity profiles only for the PGD 1.05 mini-matrix.
- Rows: `small`, `moderate`, and `stress`, each paired with its no-PGD open-loop row.
- Checkpoint policy: final trained checkpoint for all six GRU traces.
- Analytical comparators: 6D no-integrator extLQG and 6D no-integrator output-feedback H-infinity.
- Figure spec: `results/c92ebd8/figures/pgd_1p05_nominal_velocity_profiles/spec.json`.
- Navigable HTML link: `results/c92ebd8/figures/pgd_1p05_nominal_velocity_profiles/figure.html`.
